title: 音乐课
description: Music class — learning instrument names, singing together, and enjoying music

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 同学们，欢迎来到音乐课！今天我们认识乐器。这是什么？
dialogues.textPinyin: Tóngxuémen, huānyíng lái dào yīnyuèkè! Jīntiān wǒmen rènshi yuèqì. Zhè shì shénme?
dialogues.textEnglish: Classmates, welcome to music class! Today we are learning about instruments. What is this?
dialogues.textIndonesian: Teman-teman, selamat datang di pelajaran musik! Hari ini kita belajar tentang alat musik. Ini apa?

pinyinWords.note: 音 means sound, 乐 means music/happy, 课 means class. 音乐 = music, 音乐课 = music class!

options.chinese: 这是钢琴！黑色和白色的键！
options.pinyin: Zhè shì gāngqín! Hēisè hé báisè de jiàn!
options.english: This is a piano! Black and white keys!
options.indonesian: Ini piano! Tuts hitam dan putih!

pinyinWords.note: 钢 means steel, 琴 means stringed instrument. A piano has steel strings inside — so 钢琴 = steel instrument!

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 对！这是钢琴。那边是鼓。你会敲鼓吗？
dialogues.textPinyin: Duì! Zhè shì gāngqín. Nà biān shì gǔ. Nǐ huì qiāo gǔ ma?
dialogues.textEnglish: Correct! This is a piano. Over there is a drum. Can you play the drums?
dialogues.textIndonesian: Benar! Ini piano. Di sana ada drum. Kamu bisa main drum?

pinyinWords.note: 敲 (qiāo) means to knock or tap. 敲鼓 = hit the drum = play drums. 敲门 (qiāo mén) = knock on the door!

options.chinese: 我会一点！我在家练习过！
options.pinyin: Wǒ huì yīdiǎn! Wǒ zài jiā liànxí guò!
options.english: I know a little! I have practised at home!
options.indonesian: Saya bisa sedikit! Saya sudah pernah latihan di rumah!

pinyinWords.indonesian: Saya sudah pernah latihan di rumah

options.pinyin: Wǒ bù huì, dànshì wǒ xiǎng xué!
options.english: I cannot, but I want to learn!
options.indonesian: Saya tidak bisa, tapi saya mau belajar!

pinyinWords.english: I cannot / I don't know how

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 很好！现在我们一起唱歌吧！大声唱，不要害羞！
dialogues.textPinyin: Hěn hǎo! Xiànzài wǒmen yīqǐ chànggē ba! Dà shēng chàng, bùyào hàixiū!
dialogues.textEnglish: Very good! Now let us sing together! Sing loudly, don't be shy!
dialogues.textIndonesian: Bagus! Sekarang kita nyanyi bersama! Nyanyi dengan suara keras, jangan malu!

pinyinWords.note: 唱 means to sing and 歌 means song. 唱歌 = sing a song. 一首歌 (yī shǒu gē) = one song!
大声 means loud voice. 大声说 = speak loudly, 大声唱 = sing loudly. The opposite is 小声 (xiǎo shēng) = softly!

options.chinese: 好的！我喜欢唱歌！我要大声唱！
options.pinyin: Hǎo de! Wǒ xǐhuān chànggē! Wǒ yào dà shēng chàng!
options.english: Okay! I love singing! I am going to sing loudly!
options.indonesian: Baik! Saya suka bernyanyi! Saya mau nyanyi dengan suara keras!

pinyinWords.english: I am going to sing loudly
pinyinWords.indonesian: Saya mau nyanyi dengan suara keras

options.chinese: 我有一点害羞，但我会试试！
options.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yīdiǎn hàixiū, dàn wǒ huì shì shì!
options.english: I am a little shy, but I will try!
options.indonesian: Saya sedikit malu, tapi saya akan mencoba!

pinyinWords.note: 试试 (shì shì) means give it a try. Saying a verb twice in Chinese means doing it a little or casually — 看看 = take a look, 想想 = think about it!

dialogues.speaker: CHARACTER
dialogues.textChinese: 唱得好极了！音乐让人快乐！下次我们学更多歌！
dialogues.textPinyin: Chàng de hǎo jí le! Yīnyuè ràng rén kuàilè! Xià cì wǒmen xué gèng duō gē!
dialogues.textEnglish: You sang wonderfully! Music makes people happy! Next time we will learn more songs!
dialogues.textIndonesian: Nyanyiannya luar biasa! Musik membuat orang bahagia! Lain kali kita belajar lebih banyak lagu!

pinyinWords.note: 让 (ràng) means 'to let' or 'to make'. 让人快乐 = makes people happy. 让我试试 = let me try!

quizQuestions.questionText: How do you say 'piano' in Mandarin?
quizQuestions.explanation: 钢琴 (gāngqín) means piano! 钢 = steel (for the strings inside), 琴 = instrument. Steel instrument!
唱歌 (chànggē) means sing a song! 唱 = sing, 歌 = song. Simple and fun!

quizQuestions.questionText: How do you say 'music' in Mandarin?
quizQuestions.explanation: 音乐 (yīnyuè) means music! 音 = sound, 乐 = happy/music. Sounds that make you happy!

quizQuestions.questionText: Listen and choose the correct meaning!
quizQuestions.explanation: 好听 (hǎotīng) means sounds good or pleasant to hear! 好 = good, 听 = listen. Like 好吃 for food but for music!
